summary: Recommendation: ESCALATE (risk_score=0.95). Top signals: Exact Balance Drain (high); Mule Counterparty - Zero Balance (high); Known Fraud Pattern Match (high). Policy rules fired: exact_balance_drain. Matches known pattern(s): TRANSFER that empties the origin balance to the exact cent into a counterparty whose recorded balance stays at zero (pass-through mule)..

known_patterns: TRANSFER that empties the origin balance to the exact cent into a counterparty whose recorded balance stays at zero (pass-through mule).

signals.name: Exact Balance Drain
signals.detail: The transaction amount of 21580.37 exactly matches the original balance, leaving the account at 0.0.

signals.name: Mule Counterparty - Zero Balance
signals.detail: The destination account is not a merchant and consistently maintains a zero balance, indicated by a zero_balance_rate of 1.0 and newbalanceDest of 0.0 after receiving funds.

signals.name: Known Fraud Pattern Match
signals.detail: This transaction perfectly matches a known fraud pattern: a TRANSFER that empties the origin balance to the exact cent into a counterparty whose recorded balance stays at zero (pass-through mule).

risk_assessment.rationale: The transaction exhibits the strongest fraud signals: an exact-to-the-cent drain of the origin account, which is a signature of an account takeover sweep. This transfer was directed to a non-merchant account that maintains a zero balance (pass-through mule behavior). Crucially, this combination of characteristics directly matches a previously confirmed fraud pattern, elevating the risk significantly.

matched_patterns: TRANSFER that empties the origin balance to the exact cent into a counterparty whose recorded balance stays at zero (pass-through mule).
routing_reason: clear-cut case (model and policy agree, outside the ambiguous band) — standard model is sufficient
